description: Style Notedkny Men EDT spray, is an intriguing fusion of lavender and amber with fresh spices that revive and energise.Product DetailsThe notes are spices, lavender, amber, moss, wood, cedar and tobaccoCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSizeQuantity: 100 ml
